response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio phonetically matches the provided JSON lyrics for both 'Oboro' and 'Harmonia'. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized JSON lyrics for song segments; manual transcription and translation performed for the introductory talk. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed subtitles strictly to vocal activation, with aggressive truncation to handle the fast-paced nature of the BEMANI tracks. Included visual text for song credits during vocal pauses.

subtitles.original: 盛り上がってるかな？
subtitles.english: Is everyone getting excited?

subtitles.original: みんなまだ帰らないでね。このあとも楽しんでね。
subtitles.english: Everyone, don't go home yet. Keep enjoying the rest of the show.

subtitles.original: 追いかけても　追いかけても
subtitles.english: Even if I chase after you, even if I chase after you,

subtitles.original: するり指を抜ける　水のような
subtitles.english: you slip through my fingers like water.

subtitles.original: あなただけに　あなただけに
subtitles.english: Only by you, only by you,

subtitles.original: 見つめられたただ　一つ星の手に
subtitles.english: held by the hand of a single star I gazed at.

subtitles.original: 夢でも　つかまえて
subtitles.english: Even if it's a dream, catch me.

subtitles.original: 朧 / 作詞:Dali. 作曲・編曲:Starving Trancer / Ryu☆
subtitles.english: [Title: Oboro / Lyrics: Dali. Comp. & Arr.: Starving Trancer / Ryu☆]

subtitles.original: 流れる雲に想う
subtitles.english: I think of the flowing clouds,

subtitles.original: 行き先ないこの心
subtitles.english: and this heart with nowhere to go.

subtitles.original: いつか見た日の明日も
subtitles.english: Even the tomorrow of the day I once saw

subtitles.original: 蒼い通り雨
subtitles.english: is a blue passing shower.

subtitles.original: 色付いた花びら揺らす
subtitles.english: Swaying the colored petals,

subtitles.original: ぬくもりも激しささえも
subtitles.english: even the warmth and the intensity...

subtitles.original: せつなさの裏側だけを
subtitles.english: only the back side of sadness

subtitles.original: 残していくくだけの刹那
subtitles.english: is left behind in a fleeting moment.

subtitles.original: かなうのなら　かなうのなら
subtitles.english: If it can come true, if it can come true,

subtitles.original: 駆け出して行きたい風の中
subtitles.english: I want to start running through the wind.

subtitles.original: あなただけを　あなただけを
subtitles.english: Only you, only you,

subtitles.original: 見つめたなら羽ばたく蝶のように
subtitles.english: if I stare at you, I'll be like a butterfly taking flight.

subtitles.original: 夢なら　みせないで
subtitles.english: If it's a dream, don't show it to me.

subtitles.original: 星のない夜に密か
subtitles.english: Secretly in a starless night,

subtitles.original: 巡る季節を忘れて
subtitles.english: forgetting the passing seasons,

subtitles.original: いつか来る日の朝を
subtitles.english: the morning of the day that will one day come

subtitles.original: 隠す涙色
subtitles.english: is the color of hidden tears.

subtitles.original: 絡む指艶めく吐息
subtitles.english: Intertwining fingers, glamorous sighs,

subtitles.original: 昇りつめ落ちゆく心
subtitles.english: the heart that rises to the peak and falls.

subtitles.original: ひと時のぬくもりさえも
subtitles.english: Even the warmth of a moment...

subtitles.original: 忘れられずにまたひとり孤独
subtitles.english: Unable to forget, I'm alone in solitude again.

subtitles.original: 追いかけたら　追いかけたら
subtitles.english: If I chase after you, if I chase after you,

subtitles.original: 煙り消えてしまう月の影
subtitles.english: you're like the moon's shadow vanishing into smoke.

subtitles.original: わたしだけに　わたしだけに
subtitles.english: Only for me, only for me,

subtitles.original: 触れられたら煌めく星のように
subtitles.english: if I'm touched by you, I'll be like a sparkling star.

subtitles.original: 嘘なら　抱きしめて
subtitles.english: If it's a lie, hold me close.

subtitles.original: 届くのなら　届くのなら
subtitles.english: If it reaches, if it reaches,

subtitles.original: 明日さえいらない戻らない
subtitles.english: I don't even need tomorrow, I'm not going back.

subtitles.original: 離れてても　離れてても
subtitles.english: Even if we're apart, even if we're apart,

subtitles.original: 心焦がす炎はあなただけ
subtitles.english: the flame that burns my heart is for you alone.

subtitles.original: 追いかけても　追いかけても
subtitles.english: Even if I chase after you, even if I chase after you,

subtitles.original: するり指を抜ける水のような
subtitles.english: you slip through my fingers like water.

subtitles.original: わたしだけが　わたしだけが
subtitles.english: Only I, only I,

subtitles.original: 時を止めたようにただ手を伸ばす
subtitles.english: just reach out as if time has stopped.

subtitles.original: かなうのなら　かなうのなら
subtitles.english: If it can come true, if it can come true,

subtitles.original: 駆け出して行きたい風の中
subtitles.english: I want to start running through the wind.

subtitles.original: あなただけに　あなただけに
subtitles.english: Only for you, only for you,

subtitles.original: こころ巡らすはるか朧月
subtitles.english: my heart wanders under the distant hazy moon.

subtitles.original: 嘘でも　抱きしめて
subtitles.english: Even if it's a lie, hold me close.

subtitles.original: 夢なら　醒めないで
subtitles.english: If it's a dream, don't wake me up.

subtitles.original: 世界が輝くその瞬間
subtitles.english: The moment the world shines,

subtitles.original: ちょっとでも触れたくって
subtitles.english: I want to touch it, even a little.

subtitles.original: ごらんよ幻をのぞいて
subtitles.english: Look, peek into the illusion.

subtitles.original: 空間が重なって溶けあう
subtitles.english: The space overlaps and melts together.

subtitles.original: Harmonia / 作詞・作曲・編曲:Konami Arcade Games (PON)
subtitles.english: [Title: Harmonia / Lyrics, Comp. & Arr.: Konami Arcade Games (PON)]

subtitles.original: 太陽と月のように
subtitles.english: Like the sun and the moon,

subtitles.original: 繰り返す空の残像
subtitles.english: the repeating afterimage of the sky

subtitles.original: 時間を超えてはつながる
subtitles.english: is connected across time.

subtitles.original: 響きあうのさ
subtitles.english: We resonate.

subtitles.original: 大胆不敵な空想の輪郭を追いかけて
subtitles.english: Chasing the contours of a fearless fantasy,

subtitles.original: 広がっては飲み込んでいく
subtitles.english: spreading and swallowing everything.

subtitles.original: 世界が輝くその瞬間
subtitles.english: The moment the world shines,

subtitles.original: ちょっとでも触れたくって
subtitles.english: I want to touch it, even a little.

subtitles.original: ごらんよ幻をのぞいて
subtitles.english: Look, peek into the illusion.

subtitles.original: 空間を飛び越した
subtitles.english: I jumped across space.

subtitles.original: 未来を追い越すその瞬間
subtitles.english: The moment I overtake the future,

subtitles.original: いつでもこんなものなのさ
subtitles.english: it's always like this.

subtitles.original: 幻をのぞいた僕らの
subtitles.english: Our worlds, which peeked into the illusion,

subtitles.original: 世界が溶けあう
subtitles.english: melt together.
